title: Déficit asimétrico: ¿Quién gana y quién pierde con la oferta de Hacienda?
summary: El ministro de Hacienda, Arcadi España, azuza el debate sobre establecer objetivos de déficit adaptados a las necesidades de cada comunidad autónoma buscando el apoyo de Junts para desbloquear la propuesta. No todas las regiones se beneficiarían por igual. Leer

title: Los contratistas catalanes, en alerta por los costes y los concursos de obra pública desiertos
summary: Leer

title: Trump anuncia un peaje del 20% por cruzar Ormuz y dispara el petróleo sobre los 83 dólares
summary: El presidente de Estados Unidos asevera que el paso "permanecerá abierto" pese a la nueva escalada de ataques cruzados con Irán. El petróleo se dispara un 9% en la sesión. Leer

title: Estados Unidos lanza más ataques sobre Irán mientras el alto el fuego se tambalea
summary: Los enfrentamientos se intensifican mientras Trump insiste en que el estrecho de Ormuz sigue abierto e Irán afirma que está cerrado. Leer

title: New era for Gibraltar as border controls with Spain set to end
summary: Thousands of workers crossing daily between Spain and Gibraltar will enter a new era of easier travel on Wednesday, as border checks that have long been a source of tension are lifted.

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Tuesday
summary: German parents of Spanish 'house of horrors' released, Spanish PM to visit Algeria in bid to mend ties, cow destroys butcher's shop in Spanish village and more news on Tuesday July 14th.

title: Five Britons among foreign victims of deadly wildfire in Spain
summary: Five Britons, three Belgians and one national each from France and Spain are among the 13 victims of one of the deadliest Spanish wildfires in recent times, authorities said on Monday after DNA tests carried out on the bodies.

title: LATEST: Where are the wildfires in Spain right now?
summary: Although the terrible blaze that's killed at least 13 people in Almería is now under control, there are several other worrying wildfires active in Spain on Monday July 13th.

title: Spain's PM visits site of deadly Almería wildfire
summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez on Monday visited the scene of one of Spain's deadliest wildfires in recent history, which has claimed 13 lives and razed a huge area.

title: Do home insurance companies in Spain cover fires?
summary: With wildfires becoming increasingly common in Spain, it's important to find out what your home insurance will cover in the event it gets damaged in one.

title: 'Final before final': Spain face France in World Cup blockbuster
summary: Spain will attempt to neutralise one of the most potent attacking arsenals in World Cup history on Tuesday at 9pm Madrid time when they take on France in a heavyweight semi-final showdown.

title: Which European countries are already using the EES pre-registration app?
summary: The EU's border agency Frontex developed an app allowing travellers to pre-register for its Entry/Exit System rollout. With the summer travel season upon us and queues expected at tourist hotspots, what happened to the app and which countries are using it?
